title: Russia Launches Daytime Attack on Ukraine With Over 500 Drones
summary_full: The assault, which came after overnight strikes across the country, was one of the largest of the war, the Ukrainian authorities said.
summary_public: The assault, which came after overnight strikes across the country, was one of the largest of the war, the Ukrainian authorities said.
